calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-21-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Motion To Compel Employment Development Department To Comply With Subpoena
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ken Boyd, Esq. 310-564-6551 Den Labor Law for Plaintiff.
Alex Smith, Esq. 916-970-1430 Martenson, Hasbrouck & Simon for Defendant UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICE, LP .
Jennifer Addams, Esq. 415-510-3363 Deputy Attorney General for thirdf party EDD.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Argued. Ms Addams argues. Ms. Smith responds. The Court inquires re: protective order. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICE, LP's Motion To Compel Employment Development Department To Comply With Subpoena.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PRETECTION SERVICE, LP'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR ("UPS") MOTION TO COMPEL EMPLOYMENT DEPARTMENT (EDD) TO COMPLY WITH THE SUBPOENA ISSUED BY DEFENDANT IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN TWENTY (20) CALENDAR DAYS EDD WILL DELIVER TO UPS, AND THE OTHER PARTIES IN THE LITIGATION, THE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY THE SUBPOENA, SUBJECT TO THE PROTECTIVE ORDER REFERRED TO IN PARAGRAPH (2) BELOW.
(2) WITHIN FIVE (5) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER EDD WILL SUBMIT TO COUNSEL FOR UPS A PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER WHICH WILL CONTROL THE DISCLOSURE OF THE INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THE DOCUMENTS PRODUCED.
(3) WITHIN TWO (2) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE WHEN EDD PRESENTS ITS PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER COUNSEL FOR EDD AND UPS SHOULD MEET AND AGREE TO A STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) FOR SIGNING.
(4) IF THE PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO AGREE TO A STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER, EDD AND UPS WILL DELIVER TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) THEIR RESPECTIVE PROPOSED ORDERS AND THE COURT WILL PROMPTLY RESOLVE THE DISPUTE AND ENTER A PROTECTIVE ORDER GOVERNING THE COMPELLED DISCOVERY.
(5) THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail) WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION UNTIL THE ENTRY OF THE PROTECTIVE ORDER.

Ms. Addams to submit a proposed form of protective order.

MS. SMITH TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR EDD FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT AT (rennepar85@gmail.com)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)
